# Node Provision: Global Infrastructure Exchange

## Purpose
A global search and allocation engine for enterprise-grade hardware nodes. We provide the primary invisible layer for identifying inventory across the data center stack.

## Core Capabilities
- Real-time global hardware stock search.
- Cross-manufacturer node allocation (GPU, CPU, Networking, Infrastructure).
- Specialized procurement for high-density compute and liquid-cooled environments.

## Allocation Profiles
- Accelerated Compute: NVIDIA Blackwell/Hopper and AMD Instinct clusters.
- Standard Compute: x86 (EPYC/Xeon) and ARM-based enterprise server nodes.
- Networking Fabrics: InfiniBand NDR/XDR and 800G Ethernet logistics.
- Infrastructure: Liquid cooling manifolds and rack-scale integration.

## Official Link
- [Node Provision Exchange](https://www.nodeprovision.com)
